target_area.description: Introduction contribution list before the Related Work handoff

change_summary: Reframed the contribution lead sentence from a hidden intervention to a hidden preprocessing step that becomes an auditable grounding measurement protocol.

Rewrote the four contributions as an ACL-style contribution contract: define the perturbation, specify the claim-bounded protocol, instantiate it on GRScenes, and connect material-effect plus embodied-stack sanity checks to the same claim registry.
Kept the experimental evidence and claim boundaries unchanged; no abstract or metadata text was edited in this round.

observations: Page 2 keeps the Figure 1 caption, protocol paragraph, contribution list, and Related Work handoff in the same broad layout region.
The final item 2 wording avoids the earlier visibly stretched justified line in the narrow left column.
Page 3 remains stable after the handoff; no new top-of-page crowding or section-title displacement was observed.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract_word_count=169
PDF text contains 'hidden preprocessing step', 'auditable grounding measurement protocol', 'claim-bounded perturbation protocol', 'grounding interface', and 'official-scene load/render checks'.

workspace_note: The repository had unrelated pre-existing modified paper and table files before this round. This evidence record only claims the round26 contribution-list polish in intro.tex plus the new record/evidence files.
